title: gilia multicaulis var. millefoliata
intro: Gilia multicaulis var. millefoliata, a variety of the gilia plant, is a flowering herb native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of gilia multicaulis var. millefoliata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate coughs, and soothe digestive issues, as well as its potential to act as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, allowing for various herbal preparations to be used for medicinal purposes.
